channel.title: CHRISTOLIU
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2022, Christopher Liu; all rights reserved.

item.title: Read Me
item.description: Paper Demo A simple, clean, flexible Hugo theme. ⚡️ Fast | 🦋 Fluent | 🪀 Smooth Links Product Hunt: producthunt.com/posts/hugo-paper Hugo themes: themes.gohugo.io/hugo-paper Overview Install Inside the folder of your Hugo project, run: git submodule add https://github.com/nanxiaobei/hugo-paper themes/paper Open config.toml, change theme to "paper": theme = "paper" For more information, please read the official guide of Hugo. Options Available options to config.toml: disqusShortname = 'YOUR_DISQUS_SHORTNAME' # add disqus comments [params] disableHLJS = true # don't use highlight.

item.title: About
item.description: 我是劉祖豪 I’m Tsu-Hao, Liu.

item.title: resume
item.description: My resume 我是劉祖豪 I’m Tsu-Hao, Liu.

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Rich Content
item.description: Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.

item.title: Math Typesetting
item.description: Mathematical notation in a Hugo project can be enabled by using third party JavaScript libraries.

item.title: Emoji Support
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.
